title: rosa nutkana subsp. melina
intro: Rosa nutkana subsp. melina, also known as Nootka rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nootka rose include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, salves, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
